title: armeria maritima var. planifolia
intro: Armeria maritima var. planifolia, also known as Sea Thrift, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. planifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
